headline: Flexi Joins the Jack Henry(TM) Fintech Integration Network
summary: - FIN enables Flexi to integrate with Jack Henry's Symitar - ATLANTA, GA / ACCESS Newswire / June 16, 2026 / Flexi, the enterprise accounting suite purpose-built for credit unions, today announced that it has joined the Jack Henry™ Fintech Integration ...
